---
name: Template proposal
about: Propose a new standard template
title: "Template: [name]"
labels: template
---

## Template name

`template-name` (kebab-case, structural)

## Purpose

One sentence — what kind of content this layout holds.

## Slots

| Slot | Required | Accepts | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| slot-name | yes/no | text/visual/list/any | |

## ASCII layout

```
┌──────────────────────────────┐
│  [slot-name]                 │
└──────────────────────────────┘
```

## Variants (if any)

- `template-name--variant`: what changes
